summary: Completed comprehensive testing of car rental seasonal tariff system. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend contract pages display seasonal tariffs correctly, and booking flow shows dynamic pricing. Contract edit mode functional with duration changes triggering automatic recalculation.

ui_bugs.issue: Return date picker has timing/interaction issues when changing dates
ui_bugs.selector: Return date calendar in booking form
ui_bugs.details: Calendar interaction works but has some timing issues. Core functionality is not affected as dates can be selected successfully.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/prenotazioni for July 2026 includes tariffa_stagionale info and tariffa_giornaliera=75.0
Backend: GET /api/calcola-prezzo-dinamico with July dates returns seasonal rate 75.0
Frontend: Seasonal tariff box shown in RIEPILOGO ECONOMICO with green background
Frontend: Tariffa giornaliera displays 75.00 €/gg for summer booking
Frontend: 'Modifica Contratto' button found and functional
Frontend: Duration field (durata) changes trigger automatic recalculation
Frontend: Booking page shows seasonal tariff when dates changed to July 2026
Frontend: Price updates from €35/day to €75/day correctly
Frontend: Green seasonal tariff info box displays 'Tariffa Estiva 2026'
Contract page loads for both existing and newly created summer bookings
Edit mode allows duration changes with automatic date and price updates

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All seasonal pricing and booking APIs working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All core functionality working, minor calendar interaction timing issues
